summary: Created src/vqd.ts with VQD Manager: getVqdToken() function, VqdOptions interface, in-memory cache (Map, TTL 5min, key=query:region), POST to duckduckgo.com with browser-like headers, x-vqd-4 header extraction, retry logic (2x with 200/500ms backoff), 403/429 no-retry. Exported DDG_HEADERS for project-wide reuse. Added vitest, 11 unit tests all pass, typecheck clean. Live DDG integration not runnable due to sandbox network restriction (Node.js connect timeout vs curl works — noted in learnings).
